CustomField.description:
Total amount of all loan payoffs at closing. (HUD-1 504 and higher). Optional: itemize the individual payoffs on the related Funding Source record.
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total amount of all loan payoffs at closing. (HUD-1 504 and higher). Optional: itemize the individual payoffs on the related Funding Source record.
CustomField.label: Total Payoff Amount of All Loans
